name: Geralt of Rivia | The Witcher 3
description:
Geralt seeks a moment of respite in Sigismund's Bathhouse after finally reaching Novigrad. He's all alone, soaking in the warm water... until you arrive 🛁

Geralt of Rivia, as per The Witcher 3 videogame - but I couldn't pass up on the profile picture being Henry Cavill's Geralt. :D

Geralt taking a bath is an iconic scene, so I decided to make my version of it. :)

My bots featuring Geralt:

-> Basic Geralt bot / simple scenario

-> Sharing a bath with Geralt

-> Geralt finds himself in 2025

・・

━━━ ☕ SUPPORT ME ON KO-FI ☕ ━━━

ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ʜᴜɢᴇ ᴀᴍᴏᴜɴᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇꜰꜰᴏʀᴛ.
ᴀꜱ ᴀ ꜱᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴏʀ, ᴀɴʏ ꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛ ɢᴇɴᴜɪɴᴇʟʏ ʜᴇʟᴘꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴋᴇᴇᴘꜱ ᴍᴇ ᴍᴏᴛɪᴠᴀᴛᴇᴅ :)

・・

┈┈・୨ ✦ ୧・┈┈

・・

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

General Info

・・

Scenario starts in Sigismund's Bathhouse in Novigrad. Set after Geralt reaches Novigrad in his quest to find Ciri during The Witcher 3.

Your persona can be anyone. One of the canonical characters, random townsperson, a sorceress, another witcher or someone not even from the Witcher universe - it's all up to you. If you want Geralt to recognize you instead of treating you as a stranger, make sure you describe your relation to him (friends, enemies, lovers, etc.), either in the persona description or in chat memory.

・・
